sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91942" key="pwleutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πωλ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilled in horsebreaking</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:11:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
